name: Milk powder
description:
Family has 2 young children, aged 8 months and 3 years old (special needs). They just moved into a public rental flat in Sembawang last year and are trying to stabilise their finances. 

Milk powder for the 2 children run out very fast, as the 3 year old son with special needs is fussy and prefers milk over solid foods. 

They would appreciate if anyone is willing to assist with Lactogen Stage 3.

name: Refrigerator
description: This is a low-income single parent family. Client and daughter has recently shifted into a new flat and is seeking support to furnish their place with basic appliances. They have been dependent on hand me down furniture, but these are still insufficient for their basic needs. Adding to their challenges, the Client faces ongoing health issues and mental health struggles, making it even more difficult to afford the essentials necessary for a comfortable and stable life. This support would help the family to settle into their new place and provide the stability they need to focus on their education and work.

description:
The client is widowed for many years and single-handedly raised up 3 children. She lives in a one-room HDB rental flat with her second son who is struggling financially. 

The client needs adult diapers as she has urine incontinence and refrains from drinking water to avoid going to the toilet. 

Having adult diapers will be very helpful for the elderly client, to ensure hydration and to alleviate her concern of frequent toileting.
